title: Behavior Nearest Attackable Target
description: Allows the mob to check for and pursue the nearest valid target.

attack_interval.description: Minimum number of ticks between attacks on the same target.

entity_types.description: Entity types that may be targeted.

must_reach.description: Whether the entity must reach the target to attack.

must_see.description: Whether the entity must see the target to attack.

must_see_forget_duration.description: Time in seconds before losing a target that is no longer visible.

persist_time.description: Time in seconds the target is remembered after losing it.

reselect_targets.description: Whether to reselect targets when the current target dies.

scan_interval.description: Time in ticks between scans for new targets.

target_search_height.description: Vertical search range for targets. -1 means unlimited.
